name: pissa_sweep
description: PiSSA vs standard init ablation at rank 128. Best prior config (lr=3e-4, bs=16, 10k steps) as baseline. PiSSA starts on-manifold via SVD init — should eliminate intruder dimensions. rsLoRA stabilises scaling at high rank.

experiments.description: Standard Kaiming init + classic alpha/rank scaling. Replicates best prior config for A/B comparison.
PiSSA init + rsLoRA scaling. Full Tier-S config. Should start on-manifold and avoid intruder dimensions.
PiSSA init + classic alpha/rank scaling. Isolates PiSSA contribution from rsLoRA.
Standard init + rsLoRA only. Isolates rsLoRA contribution from PiSSA.
PiSSA+rsLoRA at lower lr=1e-4. PiSSA starts closer to optimum — may need less aggressive lr.
PiSSA+rsLoRA at higher lr=5e-4. Test if on-manifold start tolerates faster learning.
PiSSA+rsLoRA with dropout 0.05. Note: PiSSA forces dropout=0 (principal components should not be dropped) — this tests standard init with rsLoRA + dropout.
